message:
fix(demo): resolve i18n_demo and capability_sim_e2e compilation errors

Replace non-existent theme::current() / theme::ThemeColors with proper
theme token API (theme::fg::PRIMARY, theme::accent::PRIMARY, etc.).
Fix Constraint::Length → Fixed, Constraint::Fill(1) → Fill,
Percentage(int) → Percentage(f32). Fix CapabilityProfileBuilder
associated function call syntax.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
